reviews.comment:
Meh faltan playeros o por lo menos en principios de enero faltaban. Para comprar hielo o alguna cosa para el auto tenías que esperar bastante

(Translated by Google)
Meh, there weren't enough beachgoers, or at least there were at the beginning of January. To buy ice or anything for your car, you had to wait quite a while.

Excellent service

reviews.comment:
La más lenta de la historia. Nunca tardaron tanto para cargarme combustible. Los playeros son muy lentos y se forman 3 cuadras de fila

(Translated by Google)
The slowest ever. I've never had to wait so long to get gas. The attendants are incredibly slow, and the line stretches for three blocks.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15516558717533724848/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURob0pUbWh3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Ladrones....autos con matricula uruguaya cobran 40 %más el litro de nafta. Al los argentinos  235 y a los uruguayos 350
No vayan!
Reciben bien a los que les traen dolares......  ladrones

(Translated by Google)
Thieves...cars with Uruguayan license plates charge 40% more per liter of gasoline. For Argentinians it's 235 pesos and for Uruguayans 350.
Don't go!
They welcome those who bring them dollars... thieves
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15516558717533724848/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoaTR5VW5BRRAB

reviews.comment:
Amplio, higiénico y buena atención

(Translated by Google)
Spacious, hygienic and good service
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15516558717533724848/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoc19DbjZ3RRAB

reviews.comment:
La atención es muy buena, honestos , amables. Pero al ser una de las únicas y más baratas estaciones del lugar , se forma muchísima cola para todo principalmente para la nafta. Se cruzan los brasileros a cargar

(Translated by Google)
The service is very good; they're honest and friendly. But since it's one of the only and cheapest gas stations in the area, there are always very long lines, especially for gasoline. Brazilians cross the border to fill up.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15516558717533724848/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNobzhxa3hnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Se agradece el servicio agua caliente para mate baño con todo y wi fi 24 hs. Pero dejeme acotar que las chicas q trabajan son bastante asquerosas con ciertas personas. Basta sentarse a tomar un café  y observar como a algunos atienden bien pero  a la mayoría  ni "Buen Día Gracias Disculpe la demora". Solo una chica atendiendo y haciendo el desayuno para todos. La mañana se pone lenta. Una lástima!!! La que limpia el baño es muy maleducada . Venimos SIEMPRE. Nunca nos sonrieron. Los playeros y guardias son todo lo contrario. Serviciales y siempre con educacion

(Translated by Google)
The hot water for mate, the bathroom, and the 24-hour Wi-Fi are appreciated. However, I must point out that the staff are quite rude to certain people. Just sit down for a coffee and observe how some customers are treated well, while most don't even get a "Good morning, thank you, sorry for the delay." There's only one woman serving and making breakfast for everyone. It makes the morning drag. What a shame! The woman who cleans the bathroom is very impolite. We come here all the time. They've never smiled at us. The attendants and security guards are the complete opposite. Helpful and always polite.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15516558717533724848/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoX2VmX0VREAE

reviews.comment:
Estación de frontera lentos y no posee todos los combustibles

(Translated by Google)
Slow border station and does not have all fuels
